benefits.description: Great results from DSIP for sleep while on Retatrutide; Epitalon also helped sleep when switched to morning dosing from night
Using Epitalon for enhanced immune function

side_effects.description: Had trouble sleeping when Epitalon was dosed at night; resolved by switching to morning dosing

protocol_notes: Pins Epitalon in the morning for circadian rhythm/sleep regulation. Pins 75mcg DSIP 3 hours before bed. Sleep stack alternates between Ultra Red Reishi Extra or Lemon Balm. Also uses Magnesium, Boron, and Cistanche. Currently on Retatrutide. Uses Epitalon for anti-aging, pineal gland regulation, and immune function in addition to sleep.
